evals.prompt: Create a hook setup for a mixed VS Code + Copilot CLI team. We need separate JSON hook files by category (security, audit, session), plus one agent-specific frontmatter hook for a strict code reviewer. Include payload documentation for each event used.
evals.expected_output: Skill generates categorized JSON hook configs, an agent frontmatter hooks example, and clear payload contracts.

evals.prompt: I already have a preToolUse hook script but it breaks in one client because it expects toolName/toolArgs and receives tool_name/tool_input. Update the approach so one script handles both payload variants and explain the compatibility strategy.
evals.expected_output: Skill recommends defensive parsing and provides compatibility notes and implementation guidance.

evals.prompt: Design hooks for governance: log every prompt, deny dangerous shell commands before execution, and collect post-tool failure stats. Keep execution fast and explain timeout choices.
evals.expected_output: Skill outputs a practical hook architecture with logging and deny policy plus performance rationale.
